message:
Add Local Reconstruction Codes for erasure coding and bloodstream materialized view push infrastructure

Two new modules spanning the core and harness crates:

- lrc.rs (section 1.4): Local Reconstruction Codes extending standard erasure
  coding with locality groups. Each group of r source symbols gets a local parity
  symbol, reducing single-failure repair I/O by a factor of k/r compared to
  standard Reed-Solomon. This enables faster recovery for storage subsystem
  failures without the full-stripe read penalty of global parity.

- bloodstream.rs (bd-ehk.3): Delta-propagation infrastructure for pushing
  algebraic deltas from materialized views directly into an ANSI terminal render
  tree in O(delta) time. Implements the "bloodstream" pattern where incremental
  view maintenance results flow through a push-based pipeline rather than
  requiring full re-renders.

- core/lib.rs: Add pub mod lrc declaration.
- harness/lib.rs: Add pub mod bloodstream declaration.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
